description:
See the github link for the most up-to-date dashboard.

A Grafana dashboard built to monitor pfSense that relies on influx and Telegraf.  All artifacts and instructions are maintained in github at https://github.com/VictorRobellini/pfSense-Dashboard

targets.query: SELECT "used_percent" FROM "disk" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host$/ AND "path" = '/var/run' AND "device" =~ /^$Disk$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "device"

SELECT TOP("count","src_ip",10) FROM (SELECT count("action") FROM "autogen"."tail_ip_block_log" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "action" = 'block' AND "direction" = 'in') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "src_ip")

SELECT TOP("count","src_ip",10) FROM (SELECT count("action") FROM "autogen"."tail_ip_block_log" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "action" = 'block' AND "direction" = 'out') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "src_ip")

SELECT count("action") 
FROM "tail_ip_block_log" 
WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "action" = 'block') 
AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time($__interval), "interface" fill(0)
SELECT count("action") FROM "tail_ip_block_log" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "action" = 'block' AND "direction" = 'in') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10m), "geoip_code"

SELECT count("domain") 
FROM "tail_dnsbl_log" 
WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/) 
AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT TOP("count","src_ip",10) FROM (SELECT count("domain") FROM "autogen"."tail_dnsbl_log" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "src_ip")
SELECT TOP("count","tld",10) FROM (SELECT count("domain") FROM "autogen"."tail_dnsbl_log" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "tld")

SELECT mean("delay") 
FROM "gateways" 
WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "gateway_name" =~ /^$Gateway$/) 
AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time($__interval), "gateway_name" 
fill(previous)
SELECT mean("loss") FROM "gateways" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "gateway_name" =~ /^$Gateway$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "gateway_name" fill(null)

SELECT "friendlyname" AS "FriendlyName", "ip4_address" AS "IPv4 Address", "mac_address" AS "Physical Address", last("status") AS "Status", "ip6_address" AS "IPv6 Address" FROM "autogen"."interface" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "name" LIMIT 1
SELECT derivative(mean("bytes_recv"), 1s) *8 FROM "net" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$Host$/ AND "interface" =~ /^$LAN_Interfaces$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "pf" WITH KEY = "host"
list.label: pfSense
list.name: Host

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "pf" WITH KEY = "host"

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "disk" WITH KEY = "device" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/
list.label: Disk
list.name: Disk

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "disk" WITH KEY = "device" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "gateways" WITH KEY = "gateway_name" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/
list.label: Gateway
list.name: Gateway

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "gateways" WITH KEY = "gateway_name" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "gateways" WITH KEY = "interface" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/
list.label: WAN
list.name: WAN

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "gateways" WITH KEY = "interface" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "net" WITH KEY = "interface" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "interface_group" = 'WAN'
list.label: WAN_Interfaces
list.name: WAN_Interfaces

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "net" WITH KEY = "interface" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "interface_group" = 'WAN'

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "net" WITH KEY = "interface" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "interface_group" = 'LAN'
list.label: LAN_Interfaces
list.name: LAN_Interfaces

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "net" WITH KEY = "interface" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/ AND "interface_group" = 'LAN'

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "cpu" WITH KEY = "cpu" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/ and cpu !~ /cpu-total/
list.label: CPU
list.name: CPU

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "cpu" WITH KEY = "cpu" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/ and cpu !~ /cpu-total/

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "temperature" WITH KEY = "sensor" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/
list.label: Sensor
list.name: Sensor

query.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "temperature" WITH KEY = "sensor" WHERE "host" =~ /^$Host/

title: Dashboard - pfSense System
